hypothesis: H_A1: CL001 members are legitimately related entities (group subsidiaries) with shared group treasury banking
evidence_for: 2 of 6 pairs have a declared shared_director relationship (source: regulatory_filing, higher reliability)
evidence_against: No independent verification available within this dataset's scope
evidence_needed_to_test: External corporate registry lookup; confirmation of group structure
current_status: Plausible, untested - dataset cannot confirm or deny

hypothesis: H_A2: CUST00135 has an exclusive distribution/agency agreement with this counterparty group
evidence_for: 100% transaction exclusivity is consistent with a single-agency commercial structure common for SME exporters
evidence_against: No contractual documentation available in this dataset
evidence_needed_to_test: Copy of distribution/agency agreement; relationship-manager interview

evidence_against: 2 of 6 pairs already have a DECLARED relationship, reducing the 'undisclosed' element for those pairs specifically

evidence_for: 100% exclusivity, structurally identical to Case A

hypothesis: H_C1: Value/weight outliers reflect ordinary within-category variance (premium vs standard goods)
evidence_for: No customer/counterparty concentration; spread across 17 of 18 product categories
evidence_against: Alert rate for the set (38.8%) is notably above baseline (16.0%), which a purely benign explanation would not obviously predict
evidence_needed_to_test: Product-specialist review of a transaction sample
current_status: Partially supported; alert-rate elevation is unexplained

hypothesis: H_C2: Declared shipment weight is systematically under-captured for certain goods types

evidence_against: Not tested directly against a weight-capture completeness check
evidence_needed_to_test: Cross-reference against Stage 3 date/completeness DQ log for this specific set (not yet done)

evidence_for: Furniture category has an unusually wide legitimate value range
evidence_against: Co-occurrence with a paid non-payment claim is notable, though claim reason is a standard commercial event type

evidence_for: Weight (55,459kg) and value (9,512.77 GBP) profile is consistent with bulk agricultural commodity trade; absolute exposure is immaterial

hypothesis: H_E1: INTM00038 is an ordinary large-scale freight-forwarder, not a risk hub
